title: Sensitivity list for always* blocks could include expressions

features.name: expression in always block sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with an arithmetic or logical expression in its sensitivity list rather than a simple signal name

features.name: wire assignment used in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment that computes an expression, followed by an always block referencing that wire in its sensitivity list
features.snippet:
wire clk_sum = clk1 + clk2;
always @(posedge clk_sum) begin end
